actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been found dead near a junction in Norfolk after appearing to have been seriously assaulted.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Diego Costa has said he will not return to Chelsea this season, and that he will only rejoin the Premier League club if they pay the £32m fee that was agreed when he signed from Atletico Madrid in 2014.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: An aircraft crashed in a field in Hampshire, killing the pilot.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Port Vale has signed defender Tyler Streete on an initial one-month loan from Newcastle United.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Abdul Abbasi appeared in court after a pedestrian was hit by a reversing car.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man is accused of starting a blaze in a High Street in Aberdeenshire, which killed a 43-year-old man.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Jersey Triathlon Club has announced its team for the Gotland Island Games.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 16-year-old boy died in a car crash on the B9010 Forres to Kellas Road.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Lewandowski scored a hat-trick to lead Bayern Munich to a 3-0 victory over Borussia Dortmund and a place in the semi-finals of the DFB-Pokal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Tom Bradshaw has been loaned from Barnsley to Walsall.
